'''Felana''' was the [[Chairman/Legends|Chairwoman]] of [[Vorzyd V/Legends|Vorzyd V]], in [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]].

During that year, [[Vorzyd IV]] suffered attacks on its factories. Chairman [[Port]] accused the people of Vorzyd V, which emerged to be a competitive [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. These accusations irritated Felana and she expressed that her planet was ready for war, if the situation required it.

Finally, Felana met with Port to close down the misunderstanding.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within]]'' {{1st}}
